tasks.title: Adopt drizzle-kit generate+migrate config; commit the journal
tasks.description: Un-gitignore packages/db/src/migrations/meta/ so the journal is tracked. Confirm drizzle.config.ts out dir + both schema sources (./src/schemas + ./src/billing/schemas.ts). Verify `drizzle-kit generate` runs offline against the journal snapshot. Acceptance: meta/_journal.json committed; generate produces a diff vs an empty journal; no DB connection required for generate. DONE: removed `**/migrations/meta/` + `**/drizzle/meta/` from .gitignore (journal now trackable, verified via git check-ignore); drizzle.config.ts confirmed unchanged (out=./src/migrations, two schema sources). Journal file itself lands in T-002 (first generate).

tasks.title: Generate the 0000 baseline migration (full schema incl. 29 billing tables)
tasks.description: Run pnpm db:generate to emit migrations/0000_baseline.sql capturing the entire current TS schema, including all 29 billing tables (24 from @qazuor/qzpay-drizzle via src/billing/schemas.ts + 5 repo-owned src/schemas/billing/). Acceptance: 0000_*.sql created, journal entry added, applies cleanly via `drizzle-kit migrate` on an empty DB, FK ordering resolved, no text->jsonb cast needed (types correct from the start). DONE: generated 0000_baseline.sql (1934 lines) + meta/_journal.json + 0000_snapshot.json via offline `drizzle-kit generate --name baseline` (no DB needed). VALIDATED on an ephemeral postgres:15-alpine (port 55432): CREATE EXTENSION (uuid-ossp/pgcrypto/unaccent) preflight then apply -> ON_ERROR_STOP exit 0, 82 base tables, 32 billing tables, 45 enums, zero errors. Confirms FK ordering, billing inclusion (OQ4), and the extensions-preflight requirement (OQ2/T-006: gen_random_uuid needs pgcrypto BEFORE migrate).

tasks.title: Build migrations/extras/ — consolidate the 21 category-A extras (NNN-name.kind.sql)
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/migrations/extras/ and move the 21 surviving category-A files there, consolidating evolutionary chains: search_index (manual 0001-0004 + 0030 -> one matview file with the final definition), delete_entity_bookmarks (0006/0014/0018 -> one final enum-cast version), set_updated_at trigger (0005), billing CHECKs (0007/0008/0010), media shape CHECKs (0011 A-part + 0012), conversation partial indexes (0015), messages length CHECK (0016), bookmark indexes (0019/0020), newsletter partial indexes (0022/0023). Name each NNN-name.kind.sql (3-digit prefix for lexical ordering). All idempotent (CREATE OR REPLACE / IF NOT EXISTS). Acceptance: ~14 consolidated files; apply cleanly + idempotently after migrate on an empty DB.

tasks.title: Delete obsolete migrations: 8 B/C/D files + gh_refresh role + dead script
tasks.description: Delete the 8 one-time B/C/D manual files made obsolete by the reset (0013, 0017, 0024, 0027, 0028, 0029 + the C/D portions of 0011/0025/0026), the gh_refresh role file (0021), and the dead packages/db/scripts/verify-gh-refresh.mjs. gh_refresh is VERIFIED obsolete (Vercel+Neon-era GitHub Action; matview refresh is now the in-process node-cron job). Acceptance: files removed; git history preserves them; no remaining reference to gh_refresh or the deleted files in code/scripts.

tasks.title: Fix the db:migrate alias to a real drizzle-kit migrate
tasks.description: In packages/db/package.json change db:migrate from `drizzle-kit push` to a real `drizzle-kit migrate`. Keep db:push as the dev-only push command. db:fresh-dev stays on push (disposable local DB). Update db:regenerate accordingly. Acceptance: `pnpm --filter @repo/db db:migrate` applies versioned migrations; db:push still pushes; db:fresh-dev still works end-to-end locally.

tasks.title: Create the extensions preflight + reset SQL artifacts
tasks.description: Author the reset SQL used by the VPS rebuild: (a) a CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS preflight for uuid-ossp, pgcrypto, unaccent (VERIFIED: no VPS flow re-creates them, schema needs gen_random_uuid()); (b) the reset block `DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;` + `DROP USER IF EXISTS gh_refresh` (cluster-wide role survives DROP SCHEMA). Acceptance: SQL artifacts exist (e.g. packages/db/scripts/reset/) and run cleanly as superuser; extensions present after preflight.

tasks.title: Rewrite migrate-production.sh: real migrate + extras + abort-on-fail
tasks.description: Rewrite scripts/migrate-production.sh: backup (keep pg_dump) -> real `drizzle-kit migrate` (not push) -> apply-extras -> verify. Abort with a non-zero exit on ANY failure (kill the exit-0-on-error masking). Remove the dead `drizzle-kit check` no-op. Acceptance: a failing migration aborts non-zero and prints the backup-restore instructions; a clean migration applies migrate+extras in order.

tasks.title: Add hops db-migrate --target command (migrate + extras, no push)
tasks.description: New server-tools command `hops db-migrate --target=staging|prod`: applies the versioned carril (drizzle-kit migrate + apply-extras), target-aware, backup-before on prod, real abort-on-fail. Separate from seeding. Register in the COMMANDS array (scripts/server-tools/src/index.ts). Acceptance: `hops db-migrate --target=staging` migrates + applies extras; fails non-zero on error; prod path takes a backup first.

tasks.title: Update apply-postgres-extras to read migrations/extras/ (NNN sort)
tasks.description: Point packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.mjs at the new migrations/extras/ dir, sorting by the NNN- prefix lexically (drop the old manual/ path). Keep idempotent re-apply semantics. Acceptance: apply-extras iterates the consolidated extras in numeric order and is a no-op on a second run.

tasks.title: Split hops db-seed: keep data flags, add --migrate, swap push->migrate
tasks.description: Update scripts/server-tools/src/commands/db-seed.ts: keep --reset/--required/--example data behavior; change the internal schema step from push to delegate to db-migrate; add a --migrate flag to run db-migrate first. Ensure staging and prod use the identical process via --target. Acceptance: `hops db-seed --target=staging --migrate` runs migrate then seed; without --migrate it only seeds; no `drizzle-kit push` is invoked against the VPS anywhere.

tasks.title: Fold reset (DROP SCHEMA + DROP USER + extensions) into hops db-migrate --reset
tasks.description: Add a --reset path to hops db-migrate that runs the T-006 artifacts via hops psql: DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public; DROP USER IF EXISTS gh_refresh; CREATE EXTENSION preflight; then migrate + extras. Prod requires the existing typed confirmation. Acceptance: `hops db-migrate --target=staging --reset` rebuilds the schema from zero (extensions present, no gh_refresh) in one sanctioned command.

tasks.title: Schema-drift CI guard (scripts/check-schema-drift.sh) wired into guards job
tasks.description: New scripts/check-schema-drift.sh: run `drizzle-kit generate` (offline, diffs vs journal snapshot, no DB) and FAIL if it produces a non-empty `git diff` of migrations/ (schema changed without a committed migration). Tame the non-interactive rename-prompt behavior. Wire as a step in the `guards` job of .github/workflows/ci.yml, mirroring the existing bash guard pattern. Acceptance: clean tree passes; a tree with an un-migrated schema change fails with an actionable `run pnpm db:generate` message.

tasks.title: Switch CI from push to migrate+extras (integration + e2e)
tasks.description: Change packages/db/test/integration/global-setup.ts (and service-core's) + e2e-pr.yml/e2e-nightly.yml from `db:push` to `drizzle-kit migrate` + apply-extras, so CI exercises the exact prod path. Acceptance: integration + e2e suites build the schema via migrate (not push); a broken migration fails CI.

tasks.title: Wire env:check:registry into ci.yml (it's documented as a gate but isn't in CI)
tasks.description: Add `pnpm env:check:registry` (or its bash entry) as a step in the guards job of ci.yml so the documented 'CI gate' is actually enforced. Acceptance: a registry/schema mismatch fails CI.

tasks.title: Round-trip migration test (the anti-drift keystone)
tasks.description: Test: empty DB -> apply ALL migrations + extras -> introspect -> assert the live schema matches the TS schema (drizzle introspection diff is empty). Catches any extra that drifted from the schema. Acceptance: passes on a correct tree; fails if an extra or migration diverges from the TS schema.

tasks.title: Idempotency test (migrate x2, apply-extras x2 = no-op)
tasks.description: Test: running migrate twice and apply-extras twice leaves the schema unchanged on the second run (no errors, no diffs). Acceptance: second application is a clean no-op for both carriles.

tasks.title: Conversion regression test (type change with USING preserves data)
tasks.description: Test a representative column type conversion (e.g. text->jsonb i18n, reproducing the SPEC-172 class of bug) applied as a hand-edited migration with USING: seed old-format rows, run the migration, assert data preserved + correctly reshaped. Guards future data conversions. Acceptance: data survives the conversion; a missing USING would fail the test.

tasks.title: Drift-guard self-test (uncommitted schema change fails the guard)
tasks.description: Test/CI-fixture proving check-schema-drift.sh fails when a schema change has no committed migration, and passes otherwise. Acceptance: the guard's two states (pass/fail) are both exercised.

tasks.title: Rewrite packages/db/CLAUDE.md (two carriles + golden rule + dev-vs-VPS)
tasks.description: Rewrite the Migrations + Common Gotchas sections: the two carriles (migrations/ vs migrations/extras/), the golden routing rule, the dev-vs-VPS table, push is dev-only, db:generate is mandatory before a schema PR, the NNN-name.kind.sql extras convention, apply-extras after migrate. Acceptance: the doc matches the new reality; no stale `db:migrate = apply migrations` claim.

tasks.title: Fix root CLAUDE.md (db:migrate line + push-not-enough gotcha)
tasks.description: Correct the misleading `db:migrate` = 'Apply migrations' quick-command line and the 'drizzle-kit push is not enough' gotcha to point at the new generate+migrate flow and the two carriles. Acceptance: root CLAUDE.md is consistent with packages/db/CLAUDE.md.

tasks.title: New ADR: versioned migrations + two-carril model + reset rationale
tasks.description: Author an ADR (supersedes the relevant parts of ADR-017) recording the decision to adopt versioned drizzle-kit generate+migrate as the single source of truth, the two-carril model, push-dev-only, the reset-to-zero rationale, and the drift-guard. Cross-link from ADR-017. Acceptance: ADR added under docs/decisions/ and referenced from ADR-017.

tasks.title: Rewrite docs/guides/migrations.md (currently out of sync)
tasks.description: The existing guide describes an aspirational migrate flow that was never used. Rewrite it to the actual new flow: dev push/fresh-dev, generate-before-PR, migrate on the VPS, extras carril, hops db-migrate. Acceptance: the guide matches the implemented reality and the CLAUDE.md docs.

tasks.title: 'Rules for agents touching the schema' protocol + db-drizzle-engineer surfacing
tasks.description: Add the explicit copy-pasteable 5-step protocol to packages/db/CLAUDE.md AND surface it to the db-drizzle-engineer sub-agent (frontmatter skills / prompt), so delegated agents follow it: iterate in dev with push; generate before close; hand-edit USING for conversions; never push the VPS; CI blocks a missing migration. Acceptance: protocol present in CLAUDE.md and referenced in the db-drizzle-engineer agent definition.

tasks.title: Execute staging reset + rebuild + verify seed completes
tasks.description: Run `hops db-migrate --target=staging --reset` then `hops db-seed --target=staging`. Verify the schema is rebuilt from zero (correct types, no name/display_order failures), extras applied, and the seed completes — resolving the 2026-06-01 stuck staging seed. Acceptance: staging API healthy, seed green, search_index refreshes, no gh_refresh role present.

tasks.title: Execute prod reset + rebuild (after staging soak, typed confirmation)
tasks.description: After staging soak, run the same reset+rebuild on prod via hops db-migrate --target=prod --reset (typed confirmation) + db-seed. Backup taken first. Acceptance: prod schema rebuilt deterministically from the versioned carril; prod API healthy.

tasks.title: Close-out: green verify + index sync (specs + tasks)
tasks.description: Run lint+typecheck+test green on the branch; flip specs/index.json + tasks/index.json for SPEC-178 to completed/archived in sync (per the Index Sync Rules); engram session summary. Acceptance: both indexes agree; CI green; spec status completed.
